summary: Iteration 3: Verified bug fix (React insertBefore/NotFoundError) + 2 new features (POST /grids/verify + GET /grids result attachment). Backend 6/6 new tests pass (14/14 cumulative). Frontend: 2 full navigation passes over ALL 11 sidebar views produced ZERO insertBefore or NotFoundError errors. Verify page (analysis + validation) and MyGrids page (result panel + pending state) work end-to-end against real 1048-draw FDJ dataset.
passed: BUG FIX CONFIRMED: 2 full navigation passes over Vue d'ensemble → Historique → Statistiques → Chauds/Froids (4 tabs cycled) → Heatmap → Générateur → Backtest → Vérif grille → Mes grilles → Alertes email → Données produced ZERO 'insertBefore' or 'NotFoundError' or 'commitPlacement' errors (only 4 harmless recharts width=-1 mount warnings and 1 initial /auth/me 401 race).
Sidebar exposes 11 nav items in correct order, including new 'Vérif grille' entry (data-testid nav-v-rif-grille) linking to /dashboard/verify.

POST /api/grids/verify {numbers:[7,13,22,31,46], chance:5} against 1048 real FDJ draws returns total_draws=1048, distribution length=6 (0..5 matches, sum equals total), chance_hits=100, combined_5_and_chance=0, per_rank list, best_hits capped at 20 items.
POST /api/grids/verify returns 400 for duplicates in numbers, out-of-range number (50), and chance out-of-range (11). Missing chance returns 422 (FastAPI/Pydantic default, acceptable).

GET /api/grids attaches 'result' object (target_date, target_numbers, target_chance, main_matches, chance_match, rank_label) when a draw exists after created_at; returns result=null otherwise. Verified with a seed grid dated 2025-01-01 → result attached (Perdu, 0/5), and existing grid dated 2026-07-16 → pending (result=null, last draw is 2026-07-15).

Frontend /dashboard/verify: 5 verify-num-* inputs + 1 verify-chance input + verify-btn. Client-side validation rejects duplicate numbers with toast 'Les 5 numéros doivent être uniques'. Valid submit renders distribution cards (match-0..match-5), per-rank bar chart, and best-hits section.

Frontend /dashboard/grids: cards show either result panel (rank badge + X/5 + colored balls of the target draw, matched numbers highlighted) OR 'En attente du prochain tirage' pending state with clock icon — both states confirmed on the same page in the same session.

Frontend index.js confirmed: no React.StrictMode wrapper (only QueryClientProvider > App). This eliminates the double-effect that was triggering commitPlacement/insertBefore with Sonner Toaster portal in dev mode.
Auth path unchanged: cookie session_token → /auth/me works, dashboard shell renders user name/email from AuthContext.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/grids does an O(N_grids × N_draws) linear scan per grid to find the first draw ≥ created_at. Since draws are already sorted asc, use bisect.bisect_left on the pre-extracted date list for O(log N) — matters as history grows past a few thousand draws.
POST /api/grids/verify does a full-scan over draws (fine for 1048, becomes slow beyond ~50k). Consider precomputing per-user aggregates if history explodes.
server.py is ~1100 lines — split into modules (auth, draws, stats, backtest, alerts, grids) for maintainability (also flagged in iteration 2).

Verify page uses type='number' inputs with min/max — client validation is explicit, good. Consider disabling verify-btn while inputs are incomplete for UX polish (currently disabled only during loading).
MyGrids uses new Date(g.created_at).toLocaleString('fr-FR') — safe. rankColor() correctly maps every rank_label returned by _payout_rank.
test_credentials: session_token=test_fdj_1784196939161 (user test-fdj-1784196939161, has 1048 FDJ draws pre-imported). Set as cookie for browser tests or Bearer token for API tests. Retained in DB.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily inserted a saved_grid dated 2025-01-01 to prove GET /grids attaches 'result' — DELETED after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: React.StrictMode removal fully resolved the insertBefore/NotFoundError bug — confirmed with 22 navigation clicks + tab cycling with pageerror listener. New endpoint POST /api/grids/verify + enriched GET /api/grids fully working. backend_test.py now has TestGridVerify + TestGridsListResult classes (env vars TEST_TOKEN + REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL required to run).
rca_of_the_issue: The React 'insertBefore' / NotFoundError (commitPlacement) was caused by React.StrictMode double-invoking effects/renders in dev, which conflicts with the Sonner Toaster portal (mounted at Dashboard level) and possibly Radix portal children when route transitions triggered concurrent mount/unmount. Removing StrictMode from index.js (kept QueryClientProvider) eliminated the double-effect cycle. Verified by 2× full traversal of all 11 dashboard routes + tab-cycling on Chauds/Froids — 0 pageerror events, 0 console errors matching /insertBefore|NotFoundError|commitPlacement/.
